_meta.name: English
_meta.status: PLACEHOLDER COPY — provisional marketing copy authored by Claude Code for CCB-S2-012. Final copy will be supplied by the planning chat; replace the strings below without touching the code.

brand.name: Cinderella
brand.tagline: The AI bot suite for SimpleX communities
lang.label: Language
hero.title: The AI bot suite for SimpleX communities
hero.subtitle: Cinderella joins your public SimpleX group and turns the moments members choose to share into a permanent, searchable public archive — and she's only getting started. One identity, a growing team of agents, built privacy-first.
what.title: What Cinderella does
what.subtitle: A public archive that respects the people in the room.
what.consent.title: Consent-first
what.consent.body: Nothing a member posts is ever published until they opt in with a single command. Publication is derived from live consent — never a stale flag.
what.permanent.title: Permanent & searchable
what.permanent.body: Opted-in text, images, video, voice, files and links become a fast, full-text-searchable web archive that outlives any single chat.
what.secure.title: Secure by design
what.secure.body: Passwordless operator access, encrypted transport, local processing. The sensitive surface stays on your own machine, behind your own keys.
what.public.title: Public groups only
what.public.body: Cinderella works with public groups an operator controls. She is not a surveillance tool and never captures private conversations.
suite.title: One identity, a growing suite
suite.body: Cinderella is the identity at the centre of the system — not a single bot. The consent-based archive is her first capability; over time she brings a team of specialised agents for communities that want more than a record.
suite.archive.title: The archive
suite.archive.body: Available today: capture, consent, moderation and a searchable public front for your community's shared moments.
suite.more.title: More agents, on the way
suite.more.body: Cinderella is designed to grow. Additional agents plug into the same identity and the same privacy-first foundation.
security.title: Your data stays yours
security.body: Security isn't a feature bolted on afterwards — it's the starting point.
security.passwordless.title: Passwordless
security.passwordless.body: Operators sign in with passkeys (WebAuthn) — no shared password to phish or leak.
security.encrypted.title: Encrypted transport
security.encrypted.body: Built on SimpleX's metadata-minimising, end-to-end encrypted messaging.
security.localai.title: Local processing
security.localai.body: The core runs in one process on infrastructure you control — no third-party data broker in the middle.
security.yourdata.title: Yours to keep
security.yourdata.body: Open source and self-hostable. Your archive, your server, your rules.
cta.title: Run Cinderella for your community
cta.body: Self-host the whole suite, or explore the code first. It's open source under AGPL-3.0.
share.label: Share this page
cookie.text: We'd like to use privacy-friendly analytics to understand how this site is used. Nothing loads until you choose.
stub.lead: This page is on the way.
stub.body: We're still writing this one. In the meantime, the archive capability is live and the code is open — take a look on GitHub.
meta.home.title: Cinderella — the AI bot suite for SimpleX communities
meta.home.description: Cinderella turns the moments your SimpleX community chooses to share into a permanent, searchable public archive. Consent-first, open source, privacy by design.
meta.suite.title: The suite — Cinderella
meta.suite.description: One identity, a growing team of agents. The consent-based archive is Cinderella's first capability.
meta.pro.title: Pro — Cinderella
meta.pro.description: Cinderella for teams and larger communities. Details coming soon.
meta.security.title: Security — Cinderella
meta.security.description: Passwordless operator access, encrypted transport, local processing. Your data stays yours.
meta.open-source.title: Open source — Cinderella
meta.open-source.description: Cinderella is open source under AGPL-3.0. Self-host the whole suite.
meta.docs.title: Docs — Cinderella
meta.docs.description: Documentation for running and operating Cinderella. Coming soon.
